name: Process Masquerading as System Binary
description: Detects processes attempting to masquerade as legitimate system processes
query:
// Process Masquerading Detection
// Suspicious process names mimicking system processes from wrong location
events from endpoint
where (process_name = "svchost.exe" and process_path not contains "\System32\")
  or (process_name = "lsass.exe" and process_path not contains "\System32\")
  or (process_name = "csrss.exe" and process_path not contains "\System32\")
group by hostname, process_name, process_path
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
